authorityPolicy.read: This vocabulary generates non-overwriting trial predictions only. It does not authorize runtime source edits.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Shorten and tighten the top-right bee line so its object-track length and visible duration better match the RED target.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: Improves trial geometry only; runtime expressibility is unproven until a browser transfer proof maps the compressed path into consumed runtime fields.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Tighten the late top-left butterfly line so its visible path length and sweep shape better match the RED target.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: Improves trial geometry only; runtime expressibility is unproven until a browser transfer proof maps the compressed path into consumed runtime fields.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Make the top-right bee line read as the RED left peel-off exit instead of an opposite-side exit.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: A side-label prediction can improve semantic readability in the trial gate but is not a runtime path proof.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Make the late butterfly line read as the RED right peel-off exit instead of a center exit.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: A side-label prediction can improve semantic readability in the trial gate but is not a runtime path proof.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Keep upper-band scoreable windows as the primary human-visible read while object-track geometry is adjusted.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: This is a guardrail-only transform; it cannot make a candidate promising without object-track or readability movement.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Preserve the top-right bee line and late top-left butterfly line roles while testing geometry changes.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: This is a semantic invariant; it cannot compensate for weak object-track fit.

transformationClasses.playerFacingMeaning: Preserve no-shot/no-attack/no-loss safety and scoreable routes for every generated Stage 3 trial.
transformationClasses.predictionLimit: This is a hard guardrail class; it blocks unsafe candidates but does not improve geometry by itself.
